title: Congress Leader Vijay Wadettiwar Raises Alarm Over Illegal Mining Threatening Ancient Buddhist Caves In Chhatrapati Sambhajinagar
description: Congress leader Vijay Wadettiwar alleged illegal murum and soil excavation near ancient Buddhist caves in Chhatrapati Sambhajinagar. He accused revenue officials of inaction despite complaints and demanded FIRs against land mafias and a departmental probe into officials allegedly aiding the activity.

title: At Least Eight Angolans Experts Participate in Archaeology Training in France
description: [ANGOP] At least eight Angolan experts participate in a scientific exchange in Paris, France, From February 22 to March 1,aimed at strengthening technical skills in 3D digitization applied to archaeological heritage.

title: How would the Iran crisis play out in a world powered by renewables not fossil fuels?
description: This conflict exposes the fragility of the global fossil fuel economy and how renewables create resilience.

title: World’s smallest 2.5cm Rhynchosaur fossil found in Brazil reveals new Triassic insights
description: The discovery centers on a well-preserved skull that measures less than 2.5 centimeters (~1 inch) in length.
